name: Universal AnimBP Archetype System
description: 3-tier AnimBP framework: ONE master template, ALL characters via duplication + configuration. Features controlled by blend weight alphas, not AnimGraph rewiring.
limitation: UE5 Python API cannot modify AnimGraph nodes. Master template must be created manually once. All subsequent characters are automated via duplication.

master_template.animgraph_chain: Locomotion SM -> DefaultSlot -> LBPB -> AimOffset -> Inertialization -> Output Pose

workflow.title: Pre-flight
workflow.description: Run AnimBP Doctor to verify skeleton, blend space (11 samples), montages (5/5), character BP config

workflow.title: Create Master Template (ONE TIME)
workflow.description: Follow the AnimBP Archetype Guide PDF. Create ABP_SW_MasterTemplate with full AnimGraph chain. This is done ONCE — never repeated.
steps: Inside SM: IdleWalkRun state with BS_Strafe_WalkRun_RT (Speed, Direction)
Add jump states: JumpStart -> JumpLoop -> JumpLand with transitions
Add crouch state: CrouchMove with bIsCrouched transitions
Add Inertialization: SM transitions set to 0.2s
Wire chain: SM -> Slot -> LBPB -> AimOffset -> Inertialization -> Output
workflow.checkpoint: Master template compiles with green checkmark

workflow.title: Duplicate for All Characters
workflow.description: Run duplication script to create AnimBPs for player, enemies, NPCs. Configures per-character tier settings automatically.

workflow.title: PIE Verification
workflow.description: Play in editor and test: 1) Idle animation, 2) Walk/run blend, 3) Jump sequence, 4) Punch montage visible, 5) Dodge montage visible

adding_new_character.step_4: AnimBP is created, configured, and assigned. Done.
